title: Joyful Development: Community at Its Core

topics.title: Community Engagement and Contributions
topics.summary: Several posts on Bluesky highlight community members encouraging open-source contributions. Users share their experiences and motivate others to participate, emphasizing that even small contributions are valuable.

topics.title: Development Philosophy
topics.summary: Posts on Bluesky reflect a philosophy of joy-driven development and the importance of community in open-source projects. Contributors share insights on overcoming imposter syndrome and the value of every contribution.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Recent updates include the merging of PR #2121, which introduces an opt-in repeated pulse animation for the download graph, and PR #2119, which removes a redundant back button in the selection view. These changes enhance user experience and accessibility.

topics.title: Bug Fixes and Issues
topics.summary: The closure of Issue #2120 addresses a bug where the connect overlay button was obscured by the package menu on the alpha version. This fix ensures better functionality and user interaction on the package page.

topics.title: Project Promotion
topics.summary: Bluesky posts promote the npmx project, inviting users to explore its features and contributions. These reposts serve to increase visibility and attract potential contributors to the open-source community.
